calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
